title: Use "Collection.isEmpty()" for Testing Emptiness
description: Using 'Collection.isEmpty()' is a more direct method for checking collection emptiness than 'size() == 0'. It simplifies the code and in some cases, has a lower time complexity.
recommendation: Instead of using 'size() == 0' to check for emptiness, use 'isEmpty()' method.
impact: Improves code readability and potentially the time complexity of your code.
